LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF JEREMY RICKS'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER DIRECTING THE DEFAULT CLERK TO CANCEL FILING OF MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE FILED ON MARCH 6, 2012 IS DENIED. THE MOTION IS, IN PRACTICAL EFFECT, ONE FOR RECONSIDERATION YET IT IS NOT BASED ON ANY NEW OR DIFFERENT FACTS, LAW OR CIRCUMSTANCES AND OTHERWISE IS NOT IN COMPLIANCE WITH CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1008. MOREOVER, EVEN IF THE COURT WERE TO RECONSIDER ITS PRIOR RULING, THE COURT WOULD RE-AFFIRM THAT RULING, NOT VACATE IT. THE COURT GRANTED A STAY FOR THE CASE TO BE TRANSFERRED OR UNTIL OCTOBER 1, 2012 (30 DAYS) TO GIVE THE PLAINTIFF TIME TO FILE A WRIT WITH THE COURT OF APPEALS. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE AN ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976 =302/HK

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2012 Off Calendar

Mtn For An Order Directing The Default Clerk To Cancel Filing Of Mtn To Transfer Mtn
Off Calendar Aug-31-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROBERT H. POWSNER, TEL. NO. 362-2131 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. MICHAEL H. ROSENSTEIN, TEL. NO. (310) 285-1595 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; The court modified its tentative ruling and ruled as follows: PLAINTIFF JEREMY RICKS'S Motion For An Order Directing The Default Clerk To Cancel Filing Of Motion To Transfer Venue filed on March 6, 2012 is Denied. The motion is, in practical effect, one for reconsideration yet it is not based on any new or different facts, law or circumstances and otherwise is not in compliance with Code of Civil Procedure 1008. Moreover, even if the court were to reconsider its prior ruling, the court would re-affirm that ruling, not vacate it. The court granted a stay for the case to be transferred or until October 1, 2012 (30 days) to give the Plaintiff time to file a writ with the Court of Appeals. Moving party to prepare an order. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976 =302/hk

RULING - A R G U E D; THE ISSUE WAS DISCUSSED REGARDING THIS MOTION SHOULD NOT HAVE BEEN FILED BECAUSE THERE WAS A REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT WHICH IS PENDING AT THE CLERK'S OFFICE. DEFENDANTS CARDREADY LLC., EVOLUTION PAYMENT SYSTEMS LLC AND BRANDON BECKER'S Motion To Transfer Venue to Los Angeles County is granted. San Francisco is not the proper venue as to Mr. Becker. Under Section 396 (b), the court is exercising its discretion not to order payment of any costs or expenses incurred by either party in making this motion. Per diem fees assessed by the court. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and send by way of e-mail to the court) Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/HK
